title: Model
description: Manifest representing a trained model, its identifying information, and associated artifacts.

ModelFile.description: Represents a file associated with the model.

path.description: Path relative to the model's root directory.
path.title: Path

ModelFile.title: ModelFile

reference.description: Reference to training artifacts (e.g., Bloom ID).
reference.title: Reference

id.description: Globally unique identifier for the model.
id.title: Id

description.description: Detailed description of the model, its purpose, and capabilities.
description.title: Description

created_time.description: The date and time when the model was created (ISO 8601 format).
created_time.title: Created Time

files.description: List of files associated with the model, including paths and checksums for integrity verification.
files.title: Files

training.description: References to training-related artifacts, such as the training dataset or process.

labels.description: User-defined key-value pairs for organizing and categorizing the model.
labels.title: Labels
